Action.input_port: [6x1] Target position and orientation in world frame [cite: 59]
[6x1] Specifies which states the controller must prioritize [cite: 60]
[6x1] Allowed error margin for arrival [cite: 61]
Time to remain within tolerance before returning SUCCESS [cite: 62]
Target position/orientation during search [cite: 72]
[6x1] Controlled vs discretionary states [cite: 73]
Identification string of the target object [cite: 74]
Threshold for successful object identification [cite: 75]
[6x1] Target vector/orientation relative to Object k Frame [cite: 93]
[6x1] Controlled vs discretionary states [cite: 94]
ID string of the object to track [cite: 95]
Allowed error margin relative to object [cite: 96]
Time to remain at relative waypoint [cite: 97]
Type of trick (barrel roll, spin, somersault) [cite: 103, 106]
Time to perform the trick [cite: 107]
States to control during stabilization post-trick [cite: 110]
Required proximity to start position for SUCCESS [cite: 111]
Stabilization time post-trick [cite: 112]
Maneuver identification string [cite: 121]
Target position relative to start (FRD frame) [cite: 122, 123]
States to control upon arrival [cite: 124]
Arrival error margin [cite: 125]
Time to remain at end position [cite: 128]
